BettingMarketID.description: The unique ID associated with the betting market

BettingEventID.description: The unique id of the associated betting event

BettingMarketTypeID.description: The unique ID associated with the market type of the betting market

BettingMarketType.description: The name of the market type within a market (e.g. Player Prop, Team Prop, Game Prop, etc.)

BettingBetTypeID.description: The ID associated with the name of the bet type within a market

BettingBetType.description: The name of the bet type within a market (e.g. Total Runs, Moneyline, Run Line, etc.)

BettingPeriodType.description: The BettingPeriodType of this market (e.g. Full Game; 1st-5th Inning; 2nd Inning; Regular Season)

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO tied this market (if applicable)

TeamKey.description: The abbreviation [Key]  of the team tied to this market (if applicable)

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO tied to this market (if applicable) Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

PlayerName.description: The full name of the player associated with this market

BettingSplits.description: A list of betting splits for the BettingMarket
